title: 微软正在开发另一个类似 OpenClaw 的代理
content: 新功能将面向企业客户，与众所周知的高风险开源 OpenClaw 代理相比，具有更好的安全控制。
original_title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
original_content: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

title: 特朗普官员可能鼓励银行测试 Anthropic 的神话模型
content: 该报告尤其令人惊讶，因为国防部最近宣布 Anthropic 为供应链风险。
original_title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
original_content: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

title: ClawBench：AI代理能完成日常在线任务吗？ 153 个任务，144 个实时网站，最佳模型为 33.3% [R]
content: 我们推出了 ClawBench，这是一个基准测试，用于评估 AI 浏览器代理在 144 个实时网站的 153 项真实日常任务上的表现。与综合基准不同，ClawBench 在实际生产中测试代理
original_title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks? 153 tasks, 144 live websites, best model at 33.3% [R]
original_content: We introduce ClawBench, a benchmark that evaluates AI browser agents on 153 real-world everyday tasks across 144 live websites. Unlike synthetic benchmarks, ClawBench tests agents on actual production

title: DevDay 发布的 AMA
content: 这是历史上成为建设者的最好时代。在 DevDay 2025 上，我们推出了下一代工具和模型，以帮助开发人员更快地编码、更可靠地构建代理并扩展他们的应用程序
original_content: Its the best time in history to be a builder. At DevDay 2025, we introduced the next generation of tools and models to help developers code faster, build agents more reliably, and scale their apps in

title: Anthropic 的崛起让一些 OpenAI 投资者重新考虑
content: 一位支持这两家公司的投资者告诉英国《金融时报》，证明 OpenAI 最近一轮融资的合理性需要假设 IPO 估值为 1.2 万亿美元或更高，这使得 Anthropic 目前 3800 亿美元的估值看起来相对便宜。
original_title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
original_content: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.

title: Vercel 首席执行官 Guillermo Rauch 表示已做好 IPO 准备，人工智能代理推动收入激增
content: 尽管许多在 ChatGPT 出现之前成立的初创公司都在努力为人工智能时代做好定位，但拥有 10 年历史的开发工具和网站托管平台 Vercel 却受益于人工智能生成的应用程序和代理的爆炸式增长。
original_title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
original_content: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.

title: 编辑部
